zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin於1135年出生在蘇格蘭米德洛迪安洛斯林時，她的父親Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn25歲，母親Margaret Grathney18歲。她和Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1165年在法國皮卡迪奧易享年30歲。

nameMeanings.name: Sinclair
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Clair-sur-Elle (Manche), so called from the dedication of its church to Saint Clarus (see   Clare   3).
Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) Jewish surname.

History: The Scottish family Sinclair (see 1 above) came to southern Scotland in the twelfth century from Huntingdonshire with the de Morvilles. Descendants of these Sinclairs became earls of Caithness in the 15th century. The frequency of the surname in Caithness and Orkney is largely due to the adoption by tenants of the name of their overlord.

variants.name: Clare
meanings: Irish (Clare, Wicklow, and Wexford): habitational name from Clare in Suffolk (an eastern county of England), the center of a major Norman baronial estate since the Norman Conquest. The English placename probably originated as a Celtic river name meaning ‘bright, gentle, or warm’. The surname is not from the Irish county name Clare, which is either from the surname or from a place called with Gaelic clár ‘plank bridge’. Another Norman surname in the southeast of Ireland was de Clere, from Clères in Seine-Maritime (France), named from the local river.

English and French: from the Middle English, Old French female personal name Cla(i)re (from Latin Clara, from clarus ‘clear, bright, famous’) which achieved some popularity, greater elsewhere in Europe than in England, through the fame of Saint Clare of Assisi (see Chiara ). The English surname seems to have been interchangeable with Clear 1.

English: occupational name from an agent derivative of Middle English cley ‘clay’. The work of medieval clayers involved plastering a framework of interwoven twigs with mud to produce wattle-and-daub work.

variants.name: St. Clair
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Sinclair  . This is also a French Canadian and American French altered form of the same surname.
French (Saint-Clair): habitational name from any of several places, e.g. in Normandy, named Saint-Clair (from the dedication of their churches to Saint Clarus). Compare Saintclair .

Haitian (also Saint-Clair): ornamental name or nickname, perhaps ironic, composed of French saint ‘saint’ or ‘holy’ and clair ‘clear’ or ‘lightness’. Alternatively, perhaps of the same French origin as 2 above. Compare Saintclair .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin was born in 1135, in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, her father, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, was 25 and her mother, Margaret Grathney, was 18. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont. She died in 1165, in Oise, Picardie, France, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin est née en 1135, à Roslin, Midlothian, Écosse, son père, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Margaret Grathney, avait 18 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont. Elle est décédée en 1165, à Oise, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin 1135 in Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn 25 und ihre Mutter Margaret Grathney 18. Sie hatte mit Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1165 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Oise, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin è nata il nel 1135 nel Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, sua padre, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Margaret Grathney, aveva 18 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont. Morì nel 1165, nel Oise, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslinが1135年にスコットランドミドロスアンロスリンで生まれた時，父Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslynは25歳，母Margaret Grathneyは18歳であった。彼女はRobert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumontとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1165年にフランスピカーディオイゼで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin(이)가 1135년 스컷랜드 미들로스이언 로슬린에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Grathney(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1165년 프랑스 피카디 이스에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin nasceu em 1135, em Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, seu pai, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Grathney, tinha 18 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont. Ela faleceu em 1165, em Oise, Picardie, França, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin родилась в 1135 г. в местности рослинь, мидлотян, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Grathney, 18. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont. Она умерла в 1165 г. в местности оис, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Richilde Sinclair - Lady of Roslin nació en 1135, en Roslin, Midlothian, Scotland, su papá, Henry Sinclair 3rd Lord of Rosslyn, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Margaret Grathney, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Robert de Chaumont II - Sixth Seigneur De Chaumont. Murió en 1165, en Oise, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 30 años.
